title: geranium raimondii
intro: Geranium raimondii, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of geraniol, linalool, and geranial. The health benefits of Geranium raimondii include its ability to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. Herbal preparations of Geranium raimondii include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
